works.title: E-commerce Platform Redesign
works.description: Complete overhaul of an online store for a major fashion retailer. Improved conversion rates by 40% through optimized UI/UX, with MAU increasing 200% year-over-year.

works.title: Corporate Branding
works.description: Comprehensive brand refresh for a tech startup. Created logo design, style guide, and marketing materials to establish a strong visual identity.

works.title: Mobile Banking Application
works.description: Secure and intuitive mobile banking app with over 100,000 active users. Provides seamless transaction experience with cutting-edge security.

works.title: SaaS Dashboard Platform

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Our Services
services.intro: We provide comprehensive digital solutions ranging from web and application development to UI/UX design and digital strategy. Whether you're a startup or an enterprise, we deliver high-quality solutions tailored to your needs across industries. From strategic planning to maintenance, we contribute to the success of your digital projects as a long-term partner.

webDev.title: Website & Application Development
webDev.description: We leverage cutting-edge technologies to build web applications with exceptional performance and scalability. Using modern frameworks like React, Vue, and Next.js, we deliver solutions that maximize user experience.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: Whether native or cross-platform, we develop mobile solutions that deliver seamless experiences across devices. Experienced in building high-quality applications for both iOS and Android platforms.

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.description: Through user-centered design that blends aesthetics and functionality, we maximize brand value. From user research to design and validation, we implement a complete design process.

strategy.title: Digital Strategy & Consulting
strategy.description: Technology-based strategic planning and consulting services to help enterprises achieve digital transformation. From the user's perspective, we formulate web and app strategies, driving improvement through data analysis to fully support your digital projects.

items.question: How long does a project take from start to finish?
items.answer: It depends on the scope and complexity of the project. Small projects take weeks to months, while larger projects may take six months or more. We'll provide detailed timelines during the consultation.

items.question: Can you tell me about your pricing structure?
items.answer: Project costs are evaluated based on factors such as scope, requirements, and timeline. We provide detailed quotes after understanding your needs. Initial consultation is free, so please feel free to contact us.

items.question: Can I commission design only or development only?
items.answer: Absolutely. We can flexibly provide design-only or development-only services based on your needs. We also support collaboration with your existing team.

items.question: Is there operational support after launch?
items.answer: Yes, we provide post-launch operational and maintenance support. This includes server monitoring, security updates, content updates, performance optimization, and other ongoing services.

items.question: Do you support responsive design?
items.answer: Yes, all websites we build are responsive by default, supporting smartphones, tablets, and PCs. We can also adopt adaptive design approaches based on your specific needs.

list.title: E-commerce Platform Redesign
list.description: Complete redesign of an online store for a major fashion retailer. Streamlined complex UI and significantly improved user purchasing experience, achieving 40% increase in conversion rates through continuous A/B testing.

list.title: Corporate Branding
list.description: Comprehensive brand renewal for a fast-growing tech startup. Built a unified visual system from logo design, color palette, and typography, achieving brand consistency across all touchpoints including website and marketing materials.

list.title: Mobile Banking Application
list.description: Developed a mobile banking app with 100,000+ active users for a major financial institution. Achieved intuitive and user-friendly interface while prioritizing security, significantly improving customer satisfaction through fast transaction processing.

list.title: SaaS Dashboard Platform
list.description: Built an advanced analytics dashboard platform for enterprise clients. Delivered solutions for complex requirements including real-time data visualization, custom report generation, and advanced filtering, supporting large-scale dataset processing.

sections.heading: Project Overview
sections.content: Complete redesign of an online store for a major fashion retailer. We streamlined the complex interface and built a new platform based on user-centered design principles.

sections.heading: Challenges
items: Complex navigation making it difficult for users to find products
Multi-step purchase process leading to high cart abandonment
Incomplete responsive design with poor mobile experience
Slow page loading causing user drop-off

sections.heading: Solutions
sections.content: We significantly improved user experience through the following approaches:
items: Clean, intuitive UI based on user research
Performance improvement through image optimization and lazy loading

sections.heading: Results
sections.content: After project completion, we achieved the following results:

sections.heading: Project Overview
sections.content: Comprehensive brand renewal for a fast-growing tech startup. We built a unified visual identity system that reflected the company's new direction and values.

sections.heading: Approach
sections.content: Beyond visual design, we enhanced the entire company's brand value through the following process:

sections.heading: Project Overview
sections.content: Developed a mobile banking application for a major financial institution. Currently serving over 100,000 active users as a secure and user-friendly banking solution.

sections.heading: Project Overview
sections.content: Built an advanced analytics dashboard platform for enterprise clients. Implemented complex business logic and large-scale dataset processing with an intuitive interface.

sections.heading: Security & Compliance
items: Data encryption (at rest and in transit)

strengths.heading: Our Strengths
strengths.description: Through the fusion of design and technology, we create digital products that maximize user experience. From strategic planning to design, development, and operations, we provide consistent support and contribute to our clients' business growth.

technology.heading: Commitment to Technology
technology.description: Leveraging the latest web technologies and best practices, we develop products with outstanding performance, accessibility, and SEO. We continuously learn and build a team structure that can flexibly adapt to technological advances.

items.title: User-Centered Experience Design
items.description: In every project, we prioritize the user's perspective above all. Beyond creating beautiful designs, we conduct thorough research and testing to achieve truly usable, intuitive experiences. Every project starts with essential research for business success.

items.title: Strategy & Design Integration
items.description: We don't stop at beautiful design. Working backwards from business goals, we design optimal UI/UX based on data. Our team handles everything from branding to UI consistently, treating strategic design through implementation as one unified flow.

items.title: Cutting-Edge Technology & Quality
items.description: We actively adopt the latest frameworks and tools, selecting the best technology for each project. Focusing on performance, security, and maintainability, we deliver products that operate stably over the long term.

items.title: Speed & Flexibility
items.description: Through agile development processes, we balance quality even in rapidly changing market environments. Our professional structure enables rapid response by quickly incorporating feedback while maintaining high final quality.

items.title: Co-Creative Partnership
items.description: We're not just a client's resource — we participate in projects as partners who co-create the future. We value building long-term relationships and continue providing solutions that support business growth.

ceoMessage.title: Message from CEO
ceoMessage.subtitle: CEO Message
ceoMessage.heading: Quietly and boldly, creating tomorrow's everyday.
ceoMessage.p1: Our work is about removing the 'experience barrier' between companies and users. More intuitive, more beautiful digital experiences.
ceoMessage.p2: In an era of rapid technological evolution, we aim to continue making 'thoughtful challenges' that stay close to each person's experience, without being swept away by trends.
ceoMessage.p3: Facing challenges together with clients and creating real value through accumulated small experiments — that's what we believe partnership truly means.
ceoMessage.p4: With this conviction in our hearts, we will continue working towards creating a valuable future.

policy.title: Personal Information Protection Policy
policy.content: {company} complies with the Personal Information Protection Act and related laws and guidelines, and handles personal information appropriately.

definition.title: Definition of Personal Information
definition.content: Personal information refers to information that can identify an individual or may potentially identify an individual.

collection.title: Collection of Personal Information
collection.content: We collect customers' personal information through contact forms, email, phone, and other means. Collected information is used only for the following purposes.

management.title: Management of Personal Information
management.content: We implement appropriate security measures for collected personal information and will not disclose or provide it to third parties without legitimate reason.
